name: Dou Hua Dessert
steps: Preheat a large surface pot.
Put the Rock sugar into the pot to melt, spread them out evenly.
Keep turning the pan so it doesn't burn.
DO NOT leave the pan whilst doing.
Once all sugar's melted, add the measured warm water.
Bring the syrup up to boil, make sure all sugar's dissolved.
Decant into containers to chill.
Take what you need to freeze, the rest keep as sugar syrup.
DO NOT leave the pan during the process.
Freeze in small topperware.
Once frozen, take out of container to blitz in thermomix quickly.
Put back to freeze, otherwise the sugar sinks to the bottom.
The night before, cover barley with water and bring to boil.
Once boiled, skim and discard impurities.
Drain and vac pack the barley. Then put to FREEZE.
Next day, 1:4 pearl barley to water ratio.
Put into the pressure cooker to cook until softened.
The pre boil and freezing process help shortening the cooking time.
Once all soft, reduce, or drain the liquid to it just covers the barley.
Add rock sugar, taste.
Store in fridge. Do not pre cook a big batch.
Can pre cook and freeze the first process big batch.
Cook daily or every other day for the second half of the process.
